name: Lumigo Serverless Observability API
what_it_does: Serverless and container observability platform with REST API — providing automatic distributed tracing for AWS Lambda, GCP Cloud Functions, and Azure Functions with payload capture, dependency visualization, and cost attribution for serverless architectures.
use_cases: Querying Lambda function traces and execution data for debugging automation
Monitoring serverless function error rates and latency via API for alerting
Exporting trace data for compliance or custom analysis pipelines
Querying serverless cost attribution data by function and team
Integrating Lumigo trace data into custom observability dashboards
not_for: Non-serverless architectures (use Datadog or Instana for traditional microservices)
VM or container-only workloads without serverless
Simple CloudWatch metrics without distributed tracing
best_when: A team building primarily on serverless (AWS Lambda, GCP Functions) needs automatic tracing with payload capture and dependency visualization without manual OpenTelemetry instrumentation.
avoid_when: You run traditional microservices, VMs, or containers without significant serverless usage.

auth.notes: Token from Lumigo console. Authorization header with LumigoToken prefix. Account-scoped access. No OAuth2 or scopes — account-level access. Webhook for alert notifications.

pricing.notes: Generous free tier for small serverless workloads. Israeli company (Tel Aviv). Founded 2019 — serverless-first. Automatic instrumentation (no manual setup). Payload capture for request/response inspection. AWS marketplace available. Terraform provider. Growing serverless community.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for transactions (traces), issues, functions, and alerts. API token auth. Webhook for alert events. Good documentation for core trace queries. Payload capture is powerful — but includes sensitive data if not filtered. OpenTelemetry collector support.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All trace and metric reads are fully idempotent. Function configuration management idempotent. Alert management idempotent by ID.
known_agent_gotchas: Payload capture may include PII/secrets — configure scrubbing rules
Automatic instrumentation requires deploying Lumigo layer to Lambda
150K free traces/month limit — may hit quickly for high-volume functions

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant. Israeli company — US/EU data residency. API token auth — no scope granularity. Payload capture includes request/response data — PII scrubbing critical. Standard SaaS security.
